pages.title: Eggs as receipts
pages.text: Successful sewing yields eggs referencing:$(br)• Generic stitched $(rev)Minions$(warn)$(br)• Specialist $(rev)Night Crawlers$(warn), $(rev)Isaac$(warn), plush $(rev)Teddies$(warn).

pages.title: Isaac Egg
pages.text: Summons Issac-themed antagonists — consult Isaac chapter.
